backend/main.mo: Defines the actor for encrypted messaging with user profiles, trusted contacts, authorization checks, and basic message storage.
backend/migration.mo: Implements a no-op migration that returns the old actor state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries describing frontend updates, related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides prewritten summaries of various frontend files used throughout the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router, theme provider, and top-level app routes wrapped in AuthGate and AppShell.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Protects the app by gating content behind Internet Identity authentication and triggers profile setup for new users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout component integrating Internet Identity with loading states and cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenL: UI panel displaying token ledger diagnostics with refresh and copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenR: Displays a user's token receiving address with copy-to-clipboard support and fallback when unavailable.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/TokenS: Provides a form to send tokens with validation, error display, and a placeholder send action.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Tokens: Renders tabs for receiving and sending multiple tokens using shared panels and token config data.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Transp: Shows transport key status indicators and allows copying diagnostic JSON for debugging.
frontend/src/components/landing/Unauthen: Public landing page presenting product features and a login button for unauthenticated users.
Defines the main application layout with navigation, header, footer, and content container.
frontend/src/components/messages/Diagnos: Displays messaging eligibility diagnostics and enables copying detailed diagnostic JSON.
frontend/src/components/messages/Iso2002: Form-based ISO 20022 message builder that updates fields and renders a raw preview tab using generateIso20022Raw.
frontend/src/components/messages/RawPrev: Displays raw message text with copy-to-clipboard functionality inside a styled card.
frontend/src/components/messages/SwiftCo: Form UI for composing SWIFT messages and generating a raw preview via generateSwiftRaw.
frontend/src/config/tokens.ts: Defines token metadata, expected ledger IDs, and helper functions for configuration and glyph lookup.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication context using AuthClient, exposing identity state, login, and logout handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfiles.ts: React Query hooks to fetch and save user profiles through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for retrieving messages, fetching a message by ID, and sending new messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncStatus.ts: Query hook to fetch sync or relationship status with another principal via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTokenLedgerDiagnos: Runs configuration checks and metadata queries for ledger canisters to produce diagnostic results.
frontend/src/hooks/useTransportKey.ts: Manages transport key generation, persistence, restoration, and backend registration using vetKeys and user profiles.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrustedContacts.ts: React-query hooks for fetching, adding, removing, and checking trusted contacts via an actor canister.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variables defining light/dark color schemes and utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Provides hybrid AES-GCM and RSA-OAEP encryption/decryption for end-to-end encrypted payloads.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/transportKeys.ts: Handles RSA-OAEP transport keypair generation, export/import, and public key utilities.
frontend/src/lib/icrc/icrcLedgerClient.t: Creates a read‑only ICRC‑1 ledger actor and fetches metadata such as name, symbol, decimals, and fee.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/iso20022: Defines ISO 20022 message structure and functions to create, serialize to XML, and parse messages.
frontend/src/lib/messageFormats/swift.ts: Defines SWIFT MT103 message format with helpers to create, serialize, and parse raw SWIFT messages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with Internet Identity and React Query providers.
frontend/src/pages/ComposeMessagePage.ts: Message composition UI allowing selection of recipient, message type, and encrypted sending with transport key checks and sync status validation.
frontend/src/pages/ContactsPage.tsx: Manages trusted contacts with add/remove actions and relationship readiness indicators based on transport key and trust status.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays user identity, transport key status, and provides actions to generate keys, copy identifiers, and navigate to composing messages.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Lists sent and received messages with sender/recipient context, allowing navigation to message details.
frontend/src/pages/MessageDetailPage.tsx: Shows message metadata and attempts decryption for received messages using the user's transport key.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: Modal for new users to enter and save their profile name.
frontend/src/utils/base64.ts: Utility functions for converting between base64, Uint8Array, and ArrayBuffer for storing binary data.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning them from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/vetKey.ts: Manages generation, validation, storage, and cleanup of session-scoped vetKeys and their associated transport keypair data.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, layout, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining encrypted messaging features, architectural notes, existing features, and pending requirements.
